briefdescription.para: Create a button layout.
Add an action-backed button.

parameterdescription.para: The action represented by the new button.

briefdescription.para: Add an existing button.
Insert an existing button.
Get the number of buttons in this layout.
Access one button.
Measure this surface for a proposed size.

detaileddescription.para:
The returned layout sizes describe the margin-free content rectangle. The optional margins in the returned metrics are recommendations for the parent layout and are not included in these sizes.
scope
Measurement access for child surfaces.
proposal
The proposed size.
The measured layout metrics.

briefdescription.para: Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Handle a key press event.

detaileddescription.para:
This is the low-level event handler for key press events. If a surface handles a key press event, it should mark it as handled.
keyPressEvent
The key press event to handle.

briefdescription.para: Create a button layout.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &surface, std::size_t index, const LayoutDataPtr &data) override
memberdef.name: willAdd

briefdescription.para: Called before a child surface is added.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &surface, std::size_t index, const LayoutDataPtr &data) noexcept override
memberdef.name: didAdd

briefdescription.para: Called after a child surface was added.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &surface, std::size_t index, const LayoutDataPtr &data) noexcept override
memberdef.name: didRemove

briefdescription.para: Called after a child surface was removed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &oldSurface, const SurfacePtr &newSurface, std::size_t index, const LayoutDataPtr &oldData, const LayoutDataPtr &newData) override
memberdef.name: willReplace

briefdescription.para: Called before a child surface is replaced.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &oldSurface, const SurfacePtr &newSurface, std::size_t index, const LayoutDataPtr &oldData, const LayoutDataPtr &newData) noexcept override
memberdef.name: didReplace

briefdescription.para: Called after a child surface was replaced.
Initialize theme attributes after construction.
Return all visible buttons in insertion order.
Return all visible and enabled buttons in insertion order.

memberdef.argsstring: (Size size, Size spacing, const MeasureButtonFunction &measureButton) const
memberdef.name: buildRows

briefdescription.para: Build centered layout rows for a size.
Test if a button is fully inside the current local surface rectangle.
Move focus in a direction.
Add the represented action to this layout's dispatch container.
Remove an action when no remaining button uses it.

memberdef.argsstring: (Coordinate minimum, Coordinate trailing, Coordinate leading) noexcept
memberdef.name: collapsedSpacing

briefdescription.para: Collapse two adjacent margins with a minimum spacing.
Calculate the height required to show the prepared rows.
Calculate the minimum height required to show the prepared rows.
A horizontal button layout that centers rows and wraps when needed.
